meta.title: Sai Vardhan Makkapati — AI/ML Engineer
meta.description: AI/ML Engineer Portfolio — Building intelligent systems, multi-agent architectures, and production-grade AI infrastructure.
meta.keywords: AI Engineer, ML Engineer, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, RAG, Multi-Agent Systems, Portfolio
meta.author: Sai Vardhan Makkapati

hero.statement: I build systems that think, retrieve, and act — at production scale.

paragraphs: I'm an engineer obsessed with making AI work — not on paper, but in production.

My focus spans the full AI lifecycle: from research prototypes to scalable inference pipelines. I architect multi-agent systems, build RAG platforms that actually retrieve relevant context, and deploy models that serve predictions reliably under load.
I don't chase benchmarks. I ship products that move metrics.

terminal.output: > Production AI systems, multi-agent orchestration, retrieval-augmented generation
> "Build it right, ship it fast, make it reliable."

points: Architected a multi-agent RAG platform serving 10K+ queries/day with sub-2s latency
Built asynchronous ingestion pipelines processing 50K+ documents with intelligent chunking
Designed domain-specific guardrails reducing hallucination rate by 73%
Deployed containerized microservices with Redis caching and Qdrant vector search
Developed NLP models for multilingual document understanding (F1: 0.94)
Built end-to-end MLOps pipeline with automated retraining and model versioning
Optimized inference throughput by 4x using model quantization and batching
Published internal research on few-shot learning for domain adaptation
Built feature store serving 200M+ feature vectors for real-time inference
Implemented A/B testing framework for model experimentation across 5 product surfaces
Automated model deployment pipeline reducing deploy time from 2 hours to 8 minutes

items.title: RAG Platform
items.description: Production-grade retrieval-augmented generation system with multi-source ingestion, semantic search, and agentic query processing. Handles 10K+ queries/day.

items.title: Multi-Agent Orchestrator
items.description: Autonomous agent framework with tool-calling, memory management, and hierarchical task decomposition. Supports parallel execution and fallback strategies.

items.title: Real-Time ML Pipeline
items.description: Streaming ML pipeline for real-time fraud detection. Processes 50K events/sec with feature engineering, model inference, and alerting in under 100ms.

items.title: Document Intelligence
items.description: Multimodal document understanding system. Extracts structured data from unstructured documents using vision-language models and custom NER pipelines.

items.title: Few-Shot Classifier
items.description: Meta-learning framework for few-shot text classification using prototypical networks. Achieves 91% accuracy with only 5 examples per class on custom domains.

items.title: Inference Engine
items.description: High-throughput model serving engine with dynamic batching, model sharding, and automatic scaling. Reduces inference cost by 60% compared to naive deployment.
